title: FSMP
description: Explore the whole new adventure and build your desire world
body:
At first you will think "It is just a normal Minecraft", just give it a time.

 FSMP is the modpack create from my interest in many many mods and my needs to having a good time while playing even alone or with friends and wanted to share this to the community. Come play and have fun!
 


Here you'll find yourself in the similiar world but there are many things awaits for your discover with nothing guide or tell you what to do like Secret Friday! Explore your world with friends in action or be a lonewolf, Fly with chestplate on with amazing datapack, Easy fast travel by Waystone datapack, Easier building with Tweakeroo, Slightly change some gameplay mechanic via many Datapacks! and much much more for you to explore.
